title: Futuristic Space Pilot Girl
promptText: Create a Pixar-style character portrait of a brave young girl dressed as a futuristic space pilot. She has short, choppy hair, confident eyes, and wears a sleek metallic suit with glowing accents. Her helmet is tucked under one arm, and a small robot sidekick floats beside her. The background features a blurred view of a spaceship cockpit with distant stars. Use cool-toned lighting with subtle lens flares, high-detail 3D rendering, and a cinematic color grade.
